description_long: This is a large, industrial-style filing cabinet with a robust rectangular form and a dark gray finish. The front features three vertically stacked drawers on the left side, each with a curved metal handle, and a double-door compartment on the right, also with matching handles. The top surface is flat and bordered at the back by a raised lip, likely to prevent items from falling off. The cabinet stands on five short, sturdy cylindrical legs, providing stability and slight elevation from the ground. The overall construction suggests a metal body, suitable for heavy-duty storage in demanding environments. Its utilitarian design is ideal for organizing documents, tools, or supplies in urban workspaces.
description: A large, dark gray metal filing cabinet with three drawers, a double-door compartment, and a raised back lip, supported by five sturdy legs. Its industrial design is suited for heavy-duty storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: The front view shows three drawers with curved handles on the left and a double-door compartment with matching handles on the right, along with the raised back lip and all five legs visible.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid, featureless panel and the depth of the raised back lip, with the legs visible beneath.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain, unadorned back panel and the full width of the raised lip, with all five legs visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a solid side panel and the depth of the raised back lip, mirroring the left side.
